project_type: Next.js 16 App Router Dashboard (Customer Service Admin)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compilation and Next.js build succeeds. 2. Run npm run lint to check for linting errors. 3. Run npx prisma generate to confirm schema is valid. 4. Run npx prisma db push to confirm database migrations work.
snapshot_or_generated_files: prisma/dev.db is the SQLite database, generated by prisma db push and seed. node_modules/.prisma/client is generated by prisma generate.
setup_instructions: npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npx prisma db seed
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - full network access. Node.js v22, npm, Bun 1.2.14 available. No Docker daemon needed.
contribution_requirements: Indonesian language for UI labels and descriptions. API routes follow RESTful pattern in src/app/api/. Dashboard pages in src/app/(dashboard)/. Components colocated in page-specific components/ folders.
key_patterns: 1. Prisma ORM with SQLite for persistence. 2. API routes in src/app/api/ with NextRequest/NextResponse pattern. 3. Dashboard pages use src/app/(dashboard)/ route group. 4. shadcn/ui components in src/components/ui/. 5. Client components marked with 'use client'. 6. Server components fetch data directly via prisma. 7. Sidebar navigation defined in layout.tsx navItems array. 8. Indonesian language throughout UI.
directory_structure: / - project root with Next.js config, prisma/ - database schema and seed, src/app/(dashboard)/ - all dashboard pages, src/app/api/ - API routes, src/components/ui/ - shadcn/ui components, src/lib/ - utilities (prisma client, cn helper)
